strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work directly aligned with required AI agent development skill
Strong engineering craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, Docker/Kubernetes, and multi-language proficiency (TS, Java, Python-adjacent, DLang)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in the resume
Limited demonstrated depth with Kotlin specifically, though Java experience is present
Heavy use of DLang in past roles may indicate stack preferences that diverge from the primary TypeScript/Node ecosystem

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of full-stack engineering experience with a strong match on the primary TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work that aligns with the required AI agent development skill. Engineering craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, containerization, multi-language fluency) and architecture-level contributions across diverse domains fit a mid-senior IC role well. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience and limited Kotlin depth, though the broad polyglot background suggests these would be straightforward to pick up.
